# Security Policy

## Supported Scope

Only the current `master` branch and the deployed GitHub Pages site are supported. This repository does not maintain versioned releases of the blog.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Do not disclose exploitable details in a public issue. Report them to `youngunghan@gmail.com` with:

- the affected URL, file, or workflow;
- reproduction steps and expected impact;
- any suggested mitigation;
- whether the issue has already been disclosed elsewhere.

For vulnerabilities in the upstream Chirpy theme, report them through the [Chirpy security policy](https://github.com/cotes2020/jekyll-theme-chirpy/security/policy). The maintainer will distinguish this repository's configuration and overrides from upstream theme defects.
